embed._comment: Which embedding model to use, the dimension to truncate to, and the batch size per embed call. text-embedding-3-small is fine for most retrieval; switch to text-embedding-3-large for a modest quality bump on technical content. The dimension must match what's already in the store; mixing dims requires a re-embed.
embed._dim_note: Sandbox secure-fetch caps stdout near 146KB. 256 dim at batch_size 24 is the safe default. If you raise dim or batch_size, validate against your environment first.

search._comment: How candidates are fetched and fused. candidate_pool is the per-leg fetch size; rrf_k is the reciprocal rank fusion smoothing constant.

demo._comment: Queries the `demo` subcommand runs as a smoke test after install.
